COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-06-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Sep-20-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as a reassignment from the Master Calendar for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
John Andersen, Esq. for Plaintiff: Scott Dykes, also present.
David Samulesen and Doug Kroll, Esq. for Defendants: Linda L. Brown and Cynthia D. Brown, also present in court.
Noel Edlin, Esq. for Co-Defendant: Clay Hill Condominium HOA.
Michael Phelps, Esq. for Cross-Complainants: Linda L. Brown and Cynthia D. Brown.
9:55 a.m. Parties have settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Defendants: Browns agreed to pay the sum of $250,000.00 to Plaintiff: Dykes, payment to be made within 15 days. Parties mutually released each other from all claims.
Parties stipulated and agreed to the pending good-faith settlement agreement of the Cross-Complaint, matter will be dismissed without prejudice.
Clay Hill Condominium HOA's right to file a new complaint is preserved.
Parties agreed to terms in open court, matter is deemed settled by the Court and placed on the CRC-225 calendar of Sept. 20, 2005 at 10 a.m. for DISMISSAL.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Plaintiff Scott Dykes And For Snactions Against Plaintiff And His Attorney
Off Calendar Jun-27-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
D. Mark Jackson for defendant and moving party: Clay Hill Condominium Homeowners Association
John Andersen appearing by telephone for plaintiff and opposing party: Scott Dykes
Court Reporter: Christine L. Arneson CSR # 1690

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion to compel the deposition of plaintiff: Granted in part. Plaintiff is ordered to appear for deposition at a mutually convenient time. The deposition is to be completed by July 8, 2005. The deposition will not be videotaped. The Court finds that plaintiff previously agreed to waive the provisions of CCP Section 2024 and agreed to re-opening the deposition. Thus, the opposition to the instant motion based on CCP Section 2024(a) is without substantial justification. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $756.30 are to be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
